seo.metaTitle: The Data Pilot | Best Augmented Data Analytics Course in India
seo.metaDescription: Master Data Warehousing, SQL, and Python with an AI-Ready approach. Live Instructor-Led training from industry veterans.
seo.ogTitle: The Data Pilot | Best Augmented Data Analytics Course in India
seo.ogDescription: Logic-First. AI-Fast. Master modern data analytics with industry veterans.

header.title: About The Data Pilot
header.subtitle: Empowering the next generation of analysts
header.intro: The Data Pilot is a specialized education hub designed to train the next generation of Augmented Data Analysts. We move beyond traditional tool-based learning to focus on logic architecture and AI-driven efficiency.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To bridge the gap between academic theory and the high-speed reality of modern data departments. We empower students to master the 'human engine' of logic first, so they can effectively command the 'AI co-pilot' for world-class delivery.

points.title: Logic Architecture
points.description: We teach you to think in schemas and relational structures before touching a single line of code.

points.title: Augmented Intelligence
points.description: Master how to use Generative AI as a force multiplier for cleaning, querying, and auditing data.

points.title: Highest Delivery Standards
points.description: Our curriculum is built on industry benchmarks used in global IT firms for precision and reliability.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: Founded by industry veterans with deep expertise in Data Warehousing, SQL Architecture, and Business Intelligence. We believe that certificates don't get jobs—validated skills and real-time project portfolios do. Based in Ranchi, Jharkhand, we are committed to building a talent bench that is globally ready for the 2026 data landscape.

cta.title: Join the Cohort
cta.description: Whether you are a career transitioner or an IT professional seeking to upscale, The Data Pilot provides the roadmap for your evolution.

header.title: Privacy Policy
header.subtitle: How we handle, protect, and use your data to provide world-class educational services at The Data Pilot.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you apply for our certification programs, request a brochure, or communicate with us. This includes your full name, email address, phone number, and any educational or professional background details you choose to share.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: The Data Pilot uses your data strictly to process your enrollment, manage batch scheduling, provide targeted job assistance, and send you critical updates regarding the Augmented Data Analytics Certification. We rely on a 'Logic-First' approach to ensure data is only used when absolutely necessary for your educational success.

sections.title: 3. Data Security & Storage
sections.content: We implement strict European-standard data security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. Your data is stored securely and is never sold to third-party marketing agencies.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We may employ third-party companies and individuals to facilitate our platform (e.g., payment gateways, live classroom hosting). These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf.

sections.title: 5. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact our admissions and legal team at info@thedatapilot.in.

termsAndConditions.intro: Welcome to The Data Pilot (thedatapilot.in). These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our website and enrollment in our Augmented Data Analytics Certification.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using thedatapilot.in, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms, our Privacy Policy, and our Refund Policy.

sections.title: 2. Enrollment and Eligibility
sections.content: To enroll in the certification program, you must meet the eligibility criteria defined on our platform. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information.
list: Admission is subject to verification of background and payment clearance.
The Data Pilot reserves the right to refuse admission to any candidate without providing a specific reason.

sections.title: 3. Program Delivery
sections.content: The Augmented Data Analytics program is a 16-week live instructor-led course.
list: Access to recorded sessions and datasets is granted for a limited period.
Job assistance is provided only to students who maintain 90% attendance and complete all project milestones.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All curriculum materials, datasets, logic architectures, and software tools provided during the course are the intellectual property of The Data Pilot.

sections.title: 5. Code of Conduct
sections.content: Students are expected to maintain professional decorum. Any form of harassment will result in immediate termination of access without a refund.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Data Pilot provides training and career assistance but does not guarantee employment.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Ranchi, Jharkhand.

sections.title: 8. Contact Information
sections.content: For any clarifications regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact our legal team:

refundPolicy.intro: At The Data Pilot, we strive to provide the highest quality data analytics training. This Refund Policy outlines the conditions for refunds.

sections.title: 1. Refund Eligibility
sections.content: Students are eligible to request a refund under the following circumstances:
list: Requests made within 7 days of the initial enrollment date.
Requests made at least 48 hours before the official batch start date.
If a batch is cancelled by The Data Pilot.

sections.title: 2. Non-Refundable Situations
sections.content: No refunds will be granted if:
list: The student has accessed more than 10% of the curriculum or proprietary datasets.
The student violated the Code of Conduct.
Fees were marked as non-refundable 'seat booking' fees.

sections.title: 3. Deductions
sections.content: All eligible refunds are subject to a 10% administrative deduction.

sections.title: 4. Refund Process
sections.content: To initiate a refund, follow these steps:
list: Provide enrollment ID and reason for cancellation.
The team will respond within 3-5 business days.
